rationale: Within a ~850ms window, corp\Administrator executed a textbook ransomware/destructive-attack preparation sequence from C:\Temp\: (1) A0 — vssadmin.exe deletes all Volume Shadow Copies (/all /quiet), eliminating recovery points; (2) EV-002/EV-003 — bcdedit disables boot status policy and Windows Recovery Environment, preventing OS self-repair; (3) EV-001/EV-004/EV-005 — the Security event log is cleared via both the native 1102 audit event and wevtutil, and the System log is also cleared via wevtutil, constituting active anti-forensic/defense-evasion. All processes run at High integrity from C:\Temp\ via cmd.exe wrappers, consistent with a dropped payload or script orchestrating these steps. The combination of shadow-copy deletion, recovery disablement, and multi-log wiping in rapid succession has no credible benign explanation and is a well-documented pre-encryption or post-compromise cleanup pattern.
